'''watowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamin|dynamin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamin|dynamin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| watowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæteweth|wæteweth]] || [[word:wætewej|wætewej]] || [[word:wætewesh|wætewesh]] || [[word:wætewe|wætewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:watotowoth|watotowoth]] || [[word:watotowoj|watotowoj]] || [[word:watotowosh|watotowosh]] || [[word:watotowo|watotowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:watowoth|watowoth]] || [[word:watowoj|watowoj]] || [[word:watowosh|watowosh]] || [[word:watowo|watowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:watofwoth|watofwoth]] || [[word:watofwoj|watofwoj]] || [[word:watofwosh|watofwosh]] || [[word:watofwof|watofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:watowotho|watowotho]] || [[word:watowojo|watowojo]] || [[word:watowosho|watowosho]] || [[word:watowoko|watowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:watowoth|watowoth]] || [[word:watowoj|watowoj]] || [[word:watowosh|watowosh]] || [[word:watowo|watowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:watowothol|watowothol]] || [[word:watowojol|watowojol]] || [[word:watowoshol|watowoshol]] || [[word:watowokol|watowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:watowothotho|watowothotho]] || [[word:watowojojo|watowojojo]] || [[word:watowoshosho|watowoshosho]] || [[word:watowoko|watowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:watowothon|watowothon]] || [[word:watowojon|watowojon]] || [[word:watowoshon|watowoshon]] || [[word:watowokon|watowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:watowothoro|watowothoro]] || [[word:watowojoro|watowojoro]] || [[word:watowoshoro|watowoshoro]] || [[word:watowokoro|watowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
